use_cases: Showcasing free resources and tools in an engaging grid layout for marketing pages
Displaying product features with visual hierarchy using card-based bento design
Creating interactive landing page sections with hover effects and smooth transitions
Highlighting social proof metrics like downloads and ratings in a visually appealing format
Organizing diverse content types (links, stats, promotional offers) in a unified grid structure
ai_summary: A colorful bento-style grid layout component designed for marketing and landing pages. Features a responsive grid structure with multiple cards showcasing free resources, promotional offers, and social proof metrics. Includes smooth hover animations with scale, shadow, and rotation effects. Uses accent colors and rounded corners for a modern, approachable aesthetic suitable for SaaS and creator-focused platforms.
